case_title: WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS, INC vs. DUDKIN, SERGEY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT DUDKIN, SERGEY WRIGHT, EARTHA SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS, INC SERVED FEB-23-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUDKIN, SERGEY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO EARTHA WRIGHT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DUDKIN, SERGEY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DUDKIN, SERGEY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT DUDKIN, SERGEY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUDKIN, SERGEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 929 OAK STREET APT #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94117, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CLAIM FOR HIGHER COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS, INC
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS, INC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUDKIN, SERGEY $532.60 RENT, $180.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $183.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $896.10
